For leaderboard submissions (see CONTRIBUTING.md for the full requirements). For code or docs PRs, delete the form below and describe the change.

**Model** (name + source, e.g. Hugging Face ID or API):

**Command** (the exact `foodeval run ...` you used):

**foodeval version** (`foodeval --version`):

**Notes** (anything non-default: custom adapter, non-384 dimension, prompt or instruction prefix, hardware if it matters):

- [ ] Full benchmark, all 12 tasks, at d=384 (or noted above)
- [ ] Result JSON added to `results/`, scores not hand-edited
- [ ] Leaderboard tables updated (or ask a maintainer to)
- [ ] This model was not trained, fine-tuned, or distilled on FoodEval data
